name: Cheesy Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice off the top of each tomato and cut zigzag edges around each of them.
2. Combine the bread crumbs and shredded cheese in a bowl.
3. Season the tomatoes with salt and pepper.
4. Sprinkle the cheese and crumb mixture over the tomatoes.
5. Top with parsley.
6. Place the tomatoes on foil on the grill.
7. Heat until warm and the cheese begins to bubble.
